summary: Iteration 36 - Circle USDC Programmable Wallets Integration. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend Admin Dashboard Circle USDC tab verified with wallet balances, auto-op status, segregation summary, and fail-safe panel.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Circle USDC integration fully tested. All endpoints working correctly with real on-chain balance verification via BSC RPC. (1) GET /api/circle/wallets/balances returns 3 segregated wallets (client, treasury, revenue) with verified=true and on-chain USDC balances (currently 0.000000 USDC each - wallets are empty but verification works). (2) GET /api/circle/wallets/{role}/balance returns single wallet balance for client/treasury/revenue roles. (3) GET /api/circle/diagnostic returns Circle API health check with api_status, segregated_wallets, onchain_balances. (4) GET /api/circle/segregation/summary returns movement statistics (total_movements, confirmed, pending). (5) GET /api/circle/segregation/reconciliation returns on-chain vs ledger comparison with status=clean. (6) GET /api/circle/segregation/movements returns list of wallet movements. (7) POST /api/circle/segregation/move allows admin to manually rebalance between wallets. (8) GET /api/circle/auto-op/status returns loop status with running=true, cycle_count, operations_executed/blocked, fail_safes. (9) POST /api/circle/auto-op/start/stop controls the autonomous operation loop. (10) GET /api/circle/fail-safe/report returns reality check with all rules enforced (no_simulation, no_artificial_funds, no_uncovered_operations, real_execution_only). (11) GET /api/strategic/real-treasury still works. (12) All endpoints require Bearer token auth (401 without). Frontend Admin Dashboard has 7 tabs including Circle USDC tab showing wallet balances, auto-op status with ACTIVE indicator, segregation summary, and fail-safe panel with all rules checked.

backend_tests_summary.test_05_get_revenue_wallet_balance: PASSED - Returns role=revenue, address, balance, verified=true

backend_tests_summary.test_08_segregation_summary: PASSED - Returns total_movements, confirmed, pending, wallets
backend_tests_summary.test_09_segregation_reconciliation: PASSED - Returns status=clean, onchain_balances, ledger_balances, discrepancies=[]
backend_tests_summary.test_10_segregation_movements: PASSED - Returns movements list with count
backend_tests_summary.test_11_segregation_move_requires_admin: PASSED - Admin can create manual rebalance movement
